headline: Comcast Corporation and Comcast Cable Communications, LLC Commence Offers to Purchase for Cash Certain of their Outstanding Senior Debt Securities
summary: PHILADELPHIA, May 27, 2026--Comcast Corporation, a Pennsylvania corporation (the "Company") today announced that it has commenced cash tender offers to purchase any and all of its outstanding 2.350% Notes due 2027; 3.300% Notes due February 2027; 3.300% Notes due April 2027; 4.150% Notes due 2028; 3.150% Notes due 2028; 3.550% Notes due 2028; 5.100% Notes due 2029; 4.550% Notes due 2029; 4.250% Notes due 2030; 3.400% Notes due 2030 and 2.650% Notes due 2030 (together, the "Company Notes") (colle
